flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 40% at Meridian Technology Center vs the 2003–2007 baseline (309 vs 517).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Meridian Technology Center fell 18% between 2021 and 2024 (92.0% → 75.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 7 pp at Meridian Technology Center vs the 2003–2007 baseline (47.8% vs 55.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Meridian Technology Center rose 66% between 2006 and 2009 (42.4% → 70.4%).
